scope: Pass B expansion of the practical read surface for the configured blog: blogs, posts, pages, comments, and page-view counts. URL lookup and write/moderation endpoints remain excluded with concrete config/scope reasons.

excluded.reason: lookup by URL requires a separate blog URL input, but this bundle's spec is keyed by the configured blog_id and adding a second identity mode would widen the accepted config contract
single-post fetch is a narrower case of the posts stream already covered
post creation requires Blogger write OAuth scopes; this connector's credential contract is read-only and legacy Write returns ErrUnsupportedOperation
post updates require Blogger write OAuth scopes; this connector's credential contract is read-only and legacy Write returns ErrUnsupportedOperation
post deletion is destructive and requires Blogger write/admin OAuth scope; legacy exposes no delete write action
single-comment fetch is a narrower case of the comments stream already covered
comment moderation requires elevated blog-admin scope; out of scope, not read by legacy
